justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent did not find the exact time requested by the user, but did find other slots for the same day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered several alternative times for the same day, which was helpful.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in two turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear options and confirming the booking effectively.
